entries.note: Log onto NASA
Get started on GitLab tasks from Sprint 34 - plan with ChatGSFC
Get started on SMDC-1007, SMDC-1009 - move onto SMDC-920, ready to knock out a few tasks before 11:30 meeting today.
Twice Weekly SCIP Sprint Tag Up
Make lunch? Nah. Not yet. Let's look at Crossplane functions for a while first.
Meet with CozySummit presenter <{{|t|12505450|}}>
Recover from meeting (outside, get water)
Work up to `secrets "gitlab-credentials" not found` - we have permission to get the secret, and only that one secret, once it exists
Tagging Tag up (EKS tagging)
STAR Discussion
Prod UCP is alerting - fix it
Flux Dev Meeting <{{|t|12505450|}}>
Log into NASA
Author & implement SMDC-1315 (install metrics-server in the star-infra dev & line it up for prod deployment)
Attempt to update the ScienceCloud Tools and Services Inventory
Make a new issue about flux 2.8.6 upgrade and how it solves our noise condition in production UCP with the new feature flag `MigrateAPIVersion`
Get gitlab-admin-rotate-secret and entra-admin-rotate-secrets jobs cinched up, in sandbox and in prod, closing GitLab tickets SMDC-1009 and SMDC-920
Done with that. Workflows all validated. Reorient and refocus - what can we do before the day is over?
Try EDC architecture meeting
Work with Dorian on Flux 2.8.6 thing (MigrateAPIVersion feature gates)
Resolve alerting issues in prod ucp & solve mattermost issues around GitLab login
Wrap up day & see if we can close another ticket before fin
Resolve repeating alerts in Production UCP
time-tracker <{{|t|12505450|}}>
Log in to NASA
Check in with Jira - talk to ChatGSFC, develop the new "advise-scaling" skill (try to understand how our Keycloak scales well enough to demo to others)
Twice Weekly SCIP Sprint Tagup
Flux Bug Scrub <{{|t|12505450|}}>
Back to work - resolve noisy alert in ucp-prod (argo-wf-apps, infra, eks-auto-config all depend on Kubernetes provider & "objects" to be ready)

Debugging notifications in UCP kubernetes - why are they so noisy? (Can we clean them all up?) Why is Crossplane Kubernetes provider still at 0.15.0 in production? (Can we bring it up to at least 0.18.0 that have in Sandbox?) Let's make sure the alerts are not going to bother us on Friday, or on the weekend. That is, not unless something is genuinely wrong (and if there's something wrong, can we fix it? Like, for real - quick style.)

Get serious about reviewing open Jira tasks that are new - SMDC-1313 and SMDC-1094 - ok get totally sidetracked but fix a production issue that is impacting observability and burning up CPU and audit logs for no reason. We should be able to see this drop in the bucket on the Cost Explorer charts by Monday, (hope) ref SMDC-1327
Clean up my desk and wrap up the day.
Log into NASA
Work on lets-encrypt CLI - enable vpc flow logs, somewhere, everywhere ... (SMDC-1313) yes we will turn on Flow Logs as soon as this afternoon!
First, crossplane problems & AI solutions. I can't help myself, I see something broken, it gets in my way; I want to fix it before it can hurt anybody else.
Try to address addon loops in production ucp (smdc-shared-services-efs-claim-confluence-...) same problem in rp-cluster. Fixed.
Back to the flow logs thing
Get LLM stuff cooking on the home side (mecris-bot broke a bunch of stuff, we can fix it, this is good practice for work - you all are gonna want someone who can fix this kind of stuff, aren't you?)
Log onto NASA laptop and see if we can get the StackSet for Flow Logs deployed in sandbox, at least!
Go for a walk while the terraform plan runs in production (CBA)
Run SMDC-1313 deploy in Sandbox (it failed) let's diagnose the StackSet and see if we can understand why. Sandbox things!
It didnt work on the first try. Let's see if it works on the next try... yeah it didn't work on the third or fourth try either, we need Bick's help for this one.

Let's work on SMDC-1094 instead - Design Remediation Tracking and Reporting System - while we idle that task in the background (Speckit is on it) we're going to look at the smdc-ucp cluster to see if we can understand why there are still events firing in a loop, they should have settled down. This was that Addons issue we worked on yesterday.

Addon and Speckit - pause the Addons, let's move on for now. (Reminder to self: Create an alert for paused crossplane resources. Reminder to self: Create alerts for all Crossplane MRs! Failed & Paused statuses. Compositions & XRs too.)
Well, it looks like we are almost finished with SMDC-1094
The scan is running — 12 accounts × 17 regions = 204 API calls. I'll check progress in a moment. Still running — the output may be buffered. I'll wait for the notification when it finishes.
Generate report
Spin app and mecris development <{{|t|12505450|}}>
Log into NASA, check on Jira tasks, prepare for tomorrow
